{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320151328E7EA4DD0DD213F086948"}"},"total":2646},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7453034602668655385","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么分这么低？本来想给四分，打个五分支持一下吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735299571,"group_id":"7171398454910913550","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2353402399176414"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171398454910913550","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"138"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20613,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7453034827307500313","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总的来说值得一看。
文笔能看，有一些猥琐的幽默。逻辑较为严密，看得出来背后做了设定，还算有意思。
缺点是前期信息密度太低，可能想螺蛳壳里做道场，但效果并不理想。有的信息太多余，而有的信息又想当然的不给出。
走的是李狗解谜那一路，但李太师后期水归水，仍然把把都是有大活的；基本上出了小世界每次模拟都揭示出惊世的隐秘，前期小世界内也是写得跌宕起伏——而这文到现在才露出世界观的一角。不能只考虑主角的现实时间过了多久，也要看读者现实里看了多少章。每次模拟都在挖坑，解决的问题太少，就很容易看着不爽。
过于频繁的分段也是一个原因；你都写这种文了，分段太碎没有帮助，反而是需要连贯的思考的。不要在该是逗号的地方打个句号，然后分段。
不过在番茄算是好文了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735299455,"group_id":"7171398454910913550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8cMOZT3j1hbp6c/lriRGbwpsLLwMOKM2aaqYNDhV0HT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2353402399176414","user_name":"爱吃爆米花的摆渡人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2353402399176414","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171398454910913550","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟，玄幻，苟，剧情流，偏悬疑，有女主】

　　陈识穿越大魏神将府，为奴为婢两年半，总算攒够了第一桶金，激活了天赋人生模拟器。

　　花费一定金钱，便能模拟未来。

　　模拟结束后，还可以继承修为，物品，功法，如果改变现实轨迹，甚至可以获得命运点，刷新出各种天赋词条。

　　不死鸟：你受到任何轻伤，都能在三秒内痊愈，即使断肢，也能在短时间内长出来。（我从未发现自己身体特殊，直到某天进宫当了太监。）

　　死不瞑目：人物在模拟中死亡，能额外模拟一天（他奶奶滴，让我看看是谁杀了我。）

　　聚顶通透：全属性提升200%，智商下降200%（愚蠢的凡人呐，你们根本不懂神的智慧。）

　　..............

　　经历过多次模拟后。

　　陈识发现，这个世界并非他一个穿越者。

　　每一个穿越者。

　　都有自己独特的金手指。

　　穿越者之间，还会相互猎杀，吞并对方的金手指，升级自己的外挂。

　　而他，由于刚穿越，急于进步，就剽窃了西游记，当了文抄公，相当于开局自爆身份，导致他模拟后才惊觉，自己被穿越大军包围了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4fd04f03536b7d12f1aed6b379850980","author":"假装很正经","author_id":"","book_id":"7171398454910913550","book_name":"模拟：到处是穿越者，全都想我死","book_short_name":"悬疑模拟","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7401695153112498750","read_count":"36441","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"682177"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"336","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/efa05cfc25e3c9f3e7f84ce8d0d1f71f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174808&x-signature=%2FEcTEE52pTTvUx%2Bn6MdLK0%2BEmUo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3998304070020231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"138"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320151328E7EA4DD0DD213F086948"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20613,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":22040},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7433268442890404633","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"666，还是挺好看的修仙模拟，希望别太监，冲冲冲。看着完全停不下来，虽然篇幅不长，但信息量还是很大的，不是长篇完结也能接受，别太监然后背景补完就蛮好了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730821956,"group_id":"7171398454910913550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzmPwgtje+me8LlsniCCwjn2vWmMucwBBBDI8cB1SzdZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d120b615910d43ba95d909d43e951efa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528544&x-signature=fywdpN83ZWxnyqJxh1td2f0hvr4%3D","user_id":"1969937420653357","user_name":"混元霹雳手想要进成鲲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1969937420653357","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171398454910913550","book_info":{"abstract":"【模拟，玄幻，苟，剧情流，偏悬疑，有女主】

　　花费一定金钱，便能模拟未来。

　　模拟结束后，还可以继承修为，物品，功法，如果改变现实轨迹，甚至可以获得命运点，刷新出各种天赋词条。

　　都有自己独特的金手指。
